rationale: Labour-exploitation probe continues to name Gucci in prior round even though not newly implicated this wave; ongoing reputational overhang, not headline-fresh.
Reported exit from historic Avenue Montaigne flagship amid rent dispute signals footprint rationalisation, a mildly negative retail-network story.
Independent sell-side analysts frame the L'Oreal beauty licence shift as a structural bright spot for Gucci/Kering, but conditional/analytical rather than viral praise.
Continuing labour-exploitation investigation coverage naming Gucci among 13 groups with a subcontractor exploitation finding; reputational negative though not newly escalated.
Brand Finance ranking drop (3rd to 5th) with double-digit brand-value decline signals weakened pricing power/exclusivity perception; outside 72h window so capped at moderate magnitude.
Independent critical op-ed arguing Gucci's growth model has hit structural limits and faces a design/positioning identity crisis, not just financial headwinds.
Kering stock drop ~5.4% tied explicitly to Gucci's eleventh consecutive quarterly revenue decline plus analyst target cuts; clear, quantified negative momentum press.

Peer-comparison forum thread with posters describing Gucci quality as having slipped since Tom Ford era; per rubric peer-comparison/quality-complaint trap applies negative to Gucci, damped for community-tier mixed thread.
Polarized independent forum reaction to Demna's runway debut, split between praise for consistency and criticism of 'uninteresting'/'vulgar' pieces; genuinely mixed nets to neutral.
Split social reaction to ambassador campaign (bold statement vs. cheap-provocation criticism), plus stale (outside 14-day window); mixed/old nets to neutral with damped weight.
Brand-owned Instagram post continuing a campaign; purely descriptive activation content with no independent evaluative verdict, so neutral per activation-coverage discount.
WWD financial-desk coverage reiterating a 14.3% Q1 revenue decline with Western Europe/China as weakest geographies; clear quantified negative earnings press from a T1 outlet.
